test_scenarios: ["Verify JWT signature verification on all protected API endpoints","Attempt access to /admin routes with Vendor/Client role tokens","Test MFA bypass by manipulating authentication flows","Verify session revocation upon logout and timeout (15 min idle)","Attempt to reuse single-use tokens for Registration (US-004) and Payments (US-058)"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero critical/high vulnerabilities; 100% pass rate on RBAC matrix tests
reporting_requirements: Block deployment on failure; Alert to Security Slack channel
trend_analysis: Track unauthorized access attempts per sprint

test_scenarios: ["Send Stripe webhook events with invalid/missing signatures","Replay captured valid webhook events to test idempotency (double payment prevention)","Attempt to initiate payouts (US-060) without 'Finance Manager' role","Manipulate currency/amount fields in intercepting proxy during payment initiation"]
acceptance_criteria: Webhooks without valid signatures must return 400/401; Replayed events must not trigger state changes
reporting_requirements: Audit log verification for every financial transaction attempt
trend_analysis: Monitor rate of invalid webhook signatures

test_scenarios: ["Upload malicious file types (exe, sh) renamed as PDF/DOCX","Upload 'Zip Bomb' files to test resource exhaustion","Attempt Path Traversal via filename manipulation (../../etc/passwd)","Upload files exceeding 10MB limit via direct API calls (bypassing UI)"]
acceptance_criteria: All non-PDF/DOCX MIME types rejected server-side; Files sanitized before storage
reporting_requirements: Log all rejected upload attempts with IP correlation
trend_analysis: Track frequency of malicious upload attempts

test_scenarios: ["Verify SOW documents containing known PII (Names, Emails, Phones) are redacted before vector embedding","Check vector database logs to ensure no raw PII text is stored in embeddings","Verify 'Right to be Forgotten' (US-076) deletes/anonymizes user data across all tables"]
acceptance_criteria: 99% PII detection rate; No raw PII in 'Project Brief' read-only view

test_scenarios: ["Scan Terraform modules for open security groups (0.0.0.0/0)","Verify RDS instances are encrypted at rest and in private subnets","Check S3 buckets for public access blocking","Detect hardcoded secrets in codebase or IaC templates"]
reporting_requirements: IaC scan report attached to Pull Requests
